evaluations.name: Meal-Time Energy Spikes
evaluations.recommendation: Pre-heat kitchen equipment in stages to avoid simultaneous demand spikes.

evaluations.name: High Night-Time Base Load
evaluations.message: Building is consuming 1.146% of daytime energy overnight.
evaluations.recommendation: Investigate equipment left running overnight. Schedule HVAC setback.

evaluations.name: Demand Spike Detection
evaluations.message: Peak demand is 8.3x the average — opportunity to flatten load curve.
evaluations.recommendation: Implement demand response: stagger HVAC start, shift non-critical loads.

evaluations.name: Refrigeration Base Load
evaluations.recommendation: Validate refrigeration door seals and defrost scheduling.

evaluations.name: Weather Sensitivity Check
evaluations.message: Energy use is 19% correlated with outdoor temperature.
evaluations.recommendation: Optimize HVAC based on temperature forecast to reduce reactive energy spikes.

evaluations.name: Equipment Idle Between Service Periods
evaluations.recommendation: Install smart idle-mode controls on ovens and grills between service periods.
